metadata.name: AI Security Incident Database
metadata.description: Proprietary structured database of real-world AI/ML security incidents, breaches, and vulnerability exploits. The first machine-readable AI security incident timeline with severity scoring, attack vectors, and impact analysis. No other public dataset provides this level of structured incident data.
metadata.source: Alpha One Index - AI AppSec Index
metadata.methodology: Incidents compiled from public disclosures, CVE databases, security research papers, news reports, and vendor advisories. Severity based on CVSS-like scoring adapted for AI systems.
metadata.license: CC BY 4.0 - cite as: Alpha One Index. AI Security Incident Database. https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-appsec-index

incidents.title: ChatGPT conversation history data leak
incidents.attack_vector: Redis client bug exposing user session data
incidents.impact: User chat titles, payment info partial exposure for ~1.2% of ChatGPT Plus subscribers

incidents.title: GPT-4 training data extraction via divergence attack
incidents.attack_vector: Repeated token generation forcing memorized training data output
incidents.impact: Researchers extracted memorized PII including emails and phone numbers from training data

incidents.title: Indirect prompt injection via email in Microsoft Copilot
incidents.attack_vector: Malicious instructions embedded in emails processed by Copilot
incidents.impact: Copilot could be manipulated to exfiltrate sensitive data from user's inbox and documents

incidents.title: Adversarial image attack bypasses Google Cloud Vision safety filters
incidents.attack_vector: Adversarial perturbations on NSFW images bypass content moderation
incidents.impact: Content moderation bypass allowing prohibited content to pass safety checks

incidents.title: Supply chain attack on Hugging Face model repository
incidents.attack_vector: Malicious pickle files in model weights executing arbitrary code on load
incidents.impact: Potential remote code execution on any system loading affected models

incidents.title: DeepSeek R1 system prompt extraction and jailbreak
incidents.attack_vector: Chain-of-thought reasoning manipulation to reveal system prompts
incidents.impact: Full system prompt exposure; safety guardrail bypass

incidents.title: GitHub Copilot generating code with known vulnerabilities
incidents.attack_vector: AI model suggesting insecure code patterns from training data
incidents.impact: Copilot suggested SQL injection vulnerable code in 40% of test cases per Stanford study

incidents.title: Model inversion attack on medical AI diagnostic system
incidents.attack_vector: Gradient-based model inversion recovering patient face images from diagnostic model
incidents.impact: Patient facial images partially reconstructed from model gradients; HIPAA implications

incidents.title: Autonomous agent financial transaction exploitation
incidents.attack_vector: Prompt injection via market data feeds causing agent to execute unauthorized trades
incidents.impact: $2.4M in unauthorized trades executed before detection

incidents.title: MCP tool-use vulnerability allowing file system access
incidents.attack_vector: Malicious MCP server tools requesting filesystem access beyond intended scope
incidents.impact: AI agents granted unintended access to host filesystem through MCP tool declarations

emerging_vectors: Indirect prompt injection via data sources
